textByHash.9c357eec422444875c7796e0fc8305b849886012: No and even if I did have one I wouldn't give it to you!
textByHash.10a6a0e53fb760d211586601b0179fc6e62a79f1: Wait, are you serious? The last adventurer I spoke to down here told me that lockpicks don't help!
textByHash.5d028166162db456057a83df9508424e3f939f38: They lied about that too? I feel like a fool!
textByHash.b3c4fb3cff322efdaf1915c0627682c43350a032: Who cares about that? If it doesn't work then I should just wear the full graceful outfit since that would be much more efficient.
